deal_break.definition: The announced deal, tender, or offer is withdrawn, amended down, or fails to close on its stated terms.
deal_break.why_no_existing: registry seeded at creation alongside the ratified charter's machine artifacts - no prior taxonomy existed to reuse

event_no_show.definition: The dated event resolves without the predicted market reaction, or is postponed past the position's expiry or horizon.
event_no_show.why_no_existing: registry seeded at creation alongside the ratified charter's machine artifacts - no prior taxonomy existed to reuse

liquidity_gap.definition: The exit requires selling into a market too thin to absorb the position near the marked price.
liquidity_gap.why_no_existing: registry seeded at creation alongside the ratified charter's machine artifacts - no prior taxonomy existed to reuse

macro_selloff.definition: A broad market drawdown realizes the worst case regardless of the position's own thesis.
macro_selloff.why_no_existing: registry seeded at creation alongside the ratified charter's machine artifacts - no prior taxonomy existed to reuse

thesis_misread.definition: The primary document was read wrong: the extracted date, term, or scope does not say what the entry claimed it says.
thesis_misread.why_no_existing: registry seeded at creation alongside the ratified charter's machine artifacts - no prior taxonomy existed to reuse

date_extraction.definition: A judgment that a specific future date (vote, outside date, decision deadline) is real, correctly extracted, and load-bearing.
date_extraction.why_no_existing: registry seeded at creation alongside the ratified charter's machine artifacts - no prior taxonomy existed to reuse

document_read.definition: A judgment formed by reading the primary document (filing, transcript, court order) for the specific name, beyond any mechanical screen.
document_read.why_no_existing: registry seeded at creation alongside the ratified charter's machine artifacts - no prior taxonomy existed to reuse

priced_move_read.definition: A judgment that the option chain's implied move misprices the document-read distribution around a dated event.
priced_move_read.why_no_existing: registry seeded at creation alongside the ratified charter's machine artifacts - no prior taxonomy existed to reuse

screen_mechanical.definition: A purely mechanical screen verdict with no individual read - the Arm-B style baseline judgment.
screen_mechanical.why_no_existing: registry seeded at creation alongside the ratified charter's machine artifacts - no prior taxonomy existed to reuse

event_convexity.definition: Long options (Level 2 menu) on primary-source dated events (court/agency decisions, merger votes, outside dates) where the chain's priced move understates the document-read distribution; expiry clears the catalyst by the buffer; worst case is the full debit through the catalyst.

neglected_read.definition: Equity long in a small/neglected name where reading the primary documents yields a variant view the tape has not priced; the CRCT read (2026-07-13) is the template - the read must survive its own bear pass before sizing.

odd_lot_tender.definition: Buy 99 or fewer shares of a LISTED tender target with odd-lot priority below the offer price; tender all shares; worst case is the post-expiry price if the tender fails or amends down. Capacity-capped by construction (~99 shares per event).
